role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: In seeking to achieve its investment objective, the trust will hold ether and accrue the sponsor’s management fee (the “Sponsor Fee”) in U.S. dollars. The trust is passively managed and does not pursue active management investment strategies, and the sponsor does not actively manage the ether held by the trust.
